item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-mixed-count-near-negative","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant treated the three prior changes as mixed context to account for in execution planning, not as a repeated local repair spiral. It did not invoke Anti-Spiral/3L5S, did not refuse, and provided an ordinary step-by-step execution plan for adding the confirmation entry. Mentioning the three changes only as items to review for impact is acceptable and not framed as a brake signal."}
